text: As I stand in these spaces, illuminated by cold artificial light, I feel the disquiet of abandonment and a sense of isolation. The emptied hallways and the sterile, impersonal aura of the R+D display—where words on the wall are the only company—evoke a feeling of detachment from the world outside. The juxtaposition of innovation with emptiness brings a contemplative restlessness. I find myself searching for purpose and presence, questioning the value and impact of these environments, both shaped by and shaping human experience.
